subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

It was great connecting at the conference last month. I'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to discuss how we might work together.

Here are some available slots next week:
- Monday, April 21, 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time works for you, or feel free to propose alternatives if none of these fit.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to provide internal contact information or personnel directory data. For details on our leadership team and appropriate points of contact, please visit our public website.

Thanks, and looking forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
